view.title: Onani VPS {id}
view.reinstallNote: Mutha kukhazikitsanso kuchokera ku menyu ya kumanzere
view.cpanelNote: Bwalo la kuwongolera liyenera kukhazikitsidwa pa OS yatsopano yopanda zosintha. Ngati pali deta izitatha.
view.resendWelcomeEmailConfirm: Muli ndi chitsimikiziro chokutumizira imelo yoyambirira?
view.emailSentMessage: Imelo yoyambirira yatumizidwanso. Onani inbox yanu.

order.title: Ika Dongosolo la VPS
order.rootPasswordNote: Dziwani: Chinsinsi chiyenera kukhala ndi maulembo osachepera 8, lingaliro limodzi lazing'ono, limodzi lalikulu, nambala imodzi, ndi chilembo chapadera.
order.subscriptionRenewal: Chilolezo chidzayendetsa mwachiyambi pambuyo pa {period} pa {cost} mpaka chilekeredwe.
order.tosAcknowledgment: Mwa kusanya bokosi ili, mukuvomera kuti mukugula chinthu cha chilolezo chomwe chidzayendetsa mwachiyambi ndipo chidzalipiridwa pa khadi la krediti lomwe mupereka lero. Ngati mukufuna kuleka kuyendetsa mwachiyambi, mutha kulowa ku portalo ya kasitomala, kusankha utumiki woyenda ndikudina ulalo wa Leka kapena kutumiza imelo ku: billing{'@'}interserver.net kapena kugwiritsa ntchito njira ina yolemba mu Malamulo ndi Chikhalidwe. Mwa kusanya bokosi ndi kudina Ika Dongosolo Langa pansi, mukuvomera kuti mwawerenga, mumvetsa, ndipo muvomera Malamulo ndi Chikhalidwe athu ndi Mfundo ya Chinsinsi.

buyIp.title: Wowonjezera wa IP Wowonjezera wa VPS Yanu

buyHdSpace.title: Malo Owonjezera a Disiki ya VPS
buyHdSpace.spaceNote: Malo osakwerera 1 mpaka 100GB owonjezera a HD angagulwe

changeHostname.title: Sinthani Dzina la Seva ya VPS

changeRootPassword.title: Sinthani Chinsinsi cha Root cha VPS

changeTimezone.title: Sinthani Zon'ya Nthawi ya {module}
changeTimezone.importantNote1: Muyenera kuzima {module} kwathunthu musanasinthenye zon'ya nthawi.
changeTimezone.importantNote2: VPS idzazimika ndikuyambitsidwanso mu nthawi ya zochita.
changeTimezone.importantNote3: Zon'ya nthawi pa tsamba ili idzakhala wamba America/New_York mosasamala chomwe seva yanu yakhazikitsidwa.

changeWebuzoPassword.title: Sinthani Chinsinsi cha Woyang'anira wa Webuzo

reinstallOs.title: Khazikitsaninso OS
reinstallOs.importantNote1: Kukhazikitsanso dongosolo la ntchito kudzafufuta deta yonse.
reinstallOs.importantNote2: Musanakazidzanso dongosolo la ntchito, chonde kochererani.

resetPassword.title: Khazikitsaninso Chinsinsi cha VPS
resetPassword.windowsWarning: Kukhazikitsanso chinsinsi cha Windows kudzabweretsa kuzima kosavomerezeka. Chonde ganizani ichi ngati njira yomaliza. Tsimikizani mu VNC kuti zosintha zilibe kuyenda. Ngati zosintha zikuyenda VNC idzasonyeza: Windows ikulemba zosintha, musazime. Kuzima mu mkhalidwe uwu kungathe kubweretsa makina osayamba.

reverseDns.title: DNS Woyamba
reverseDns.dnsChangeNote: Zosintha mu DNS Woyamba zimatenga mpaka ola limodzi kusonyezeka.

vnc.remoteDesktopDescription: Kulipo pa Windows Platform yokha. Remote Desktop ndi njira yachangu yodalirika kulumikizika ku chipululu cha makina amagulu.
vnc.remoteDesktopStep1: Chinsinsi cha Woyang'anira chiyenera kukhazikitsidwa pa VPS musanagwiritsa ntchito remote desktop.
vnc.remoteDesktopStep2: Lumikizanani ndi VNC kapena HTML5 VNC kukhazikitsa chinsinsi chanu choyamba.
vnc.remoteDesktopNote: Kwa chiphunzitso cha remote desktop dinani
vnc.desktopVncDescription: VNC ikukulolani kulumikizika ku chipululu cha makina amagulu. VNC ingayendetsedwe mu browser kapena ngati kasitomala yoyelekera. Adilesi ya IP ya kompyuta yanu iyenera kupatsidwa mwayi musanakhazikitsidwe kulumikizika.
vnc.grantIpAccess: Patsani Mwayi wa IP Yanu ku VNC
vnc.grantIpWait: Chonde dikireni mphindi 2 kuti zochita zikwaniritsidwe.
vnc.vncClientNote: Mutha kutsitsa kasitomala imodzi mwa ma VNC ambiri apezekaka pa intaneti. Timapereka TightVNC. Lumikizanani pogwiritsa ntchito adilesi ya IP ya VPS. Chinsinsi sichikufunikira pambuyo pa adilesi yanu yakutali yapatsidwa mu gawo 1.
vnc.connectHtml5: Kulumikizika pogwiritsa ntchito HTML5 VNC Client:
vnc.html5Note: HTML5 VNC client imayenda bwino mu browser iliyonse yatsopano kuphatikizapo ma browser a foni (iOS ndi Android).

setupVnc.title: Khazikitsani VNC
setupVnc.grantAccess: Patsani Mwayi wa VNC ku IP

insertCd.insertIso: Lowetsani Chithunzi cha ISO mu Diraivi ya CD-ROM
insertCd.urlPlaceholder: Lowetsani URL ya CD kapena DVD ISO

backup.backupsPartitionNote: Zakochera zidzagwira ntchito ndi kugawika kwamba kokha.

restore.offlineNote: Seva yanu idzakhala yotentha ikutsimikizira mafailo anu onse a makono ndi amene ali pa kochera. Chonde lumikizanani ndi thandizo ndi mafunso.

trafficUsage.title: Kugwiritsidwa Ntchito kwa Mwini Intaneti / Kusamuka
trafficUsage.billingNote: Izi sizigwiritsidwa ntchito pa kuwerengera kulipira ndipo ndi chiwerengero chokha cholingana ndi khadi lanu la netiweki la mamagulu.
